description: Format the municipal policy draft from ~/Documents/TextDocuments/raw_str_ordinance.txt into a publication-ready legal document in ONLYOFFICE Document Editor. Apply 18pt Bold Center Alignment to the title lines 'ORDINANCE NO. 2026-04' and 'REGULATION OF SHORT-TERM RENTALS'. Format the four main section headers ('Section 1: Definitions', 'Section 2: Licensing Requirements', 'Section 3: Operational Standards', and 'Section 4: Penalties and Enforcement') as 14pt Bold. Convert the violation and fine information under Section 4 (Tier 1 Violation, Tier 2 Violation, Operating without license, and Revocation) into a table with at least 2 columns and 4 rows. Right Align the signature block containing 'Mayor Jane Doe' and 'Attest: City Clerk John Smith'. Save the completed document to ~/Documents/TextDocuments/str_ordinance_final.docx.
